scripts.build: npm run build -w core && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n web,frontend -c blue,magenta "npm run dev -w web" "npm run dev -w frontend"
scripts.test: npm run test -w core && npm run test -w web && npm run test -w frontend
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck -w core && npm run typecheck -w web && npm run typecheck -w frontend
